theme.name: Swiss Brutalist Library
theme.description: An objective, rigid, and functional design system tailored for a data-dense Library Management System. Prioritizes extreme clarity, structural grid layouts, and high-visibility signal colors over decorative elements. Shadows are removed in favor of strict 1px borders.

rules: Headings NEVER use Inter. Chivo is mandatory.
Labels, overlines, and table headers MUST use the 'label' scale (uppercase, wide tracking).
Serial numbers, User IDs, Membership IDs, and Dates MUST use IBM Plex Mono.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode B: The Control Room Grid
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Generous internal padding (p-8) for forms.
rules: Use sharp edges. Global border-radius must be 'rounded-none' or at most 'rounded-sm' (2px).
Cardless design heavily preferred. Use 'border-collapse' style grids with 1px solid borders separating sections instead of floating cards.
Forms should be dense but legible. Form groups separated by generous spacing (gap-6 or gap-8).
No drop shadows for structural elements. Depth is achieved via contrast and borders.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF4B00] text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#D63F00] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF4B00] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#111111] text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#333333] transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#111111] text-[#111111] font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#F3F3F0] transition-colors

inputs.default: h-12 border border-[#E0E0D9] bg-white px-4 text-base rounded-none focus:border-[#FF4B00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF4B00] transition-all outline-none

checkboxes_and_radios.style: Sharp square boxes. When checked, fill with #FF4B00. Radio buttons are square inside a square (brutalist twist) or standard circle but with stark solid fills.
checkboxes_and_radios.behavior: Radio buttons must only allow one selection. Checkboxes act as Yes/No.

tables.header: bg-[#F3F3F0] border-b-2 border-[#111111] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[#595956] py-3 px-4

shadcn_overrides: Override all Card, Dialog, and Popover components to have 'rounded-none' and 'shadow-none', replacing shadows with 'border-2 border-[#111111]'.
Override Tabs to look like folder tabs with sharp edges and strong active borders.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Explicit text and background color changes. No subtle fades; instant or fast (150ms) snappy transitions.
interactions_and_motion.focus: High contrast focus rings (2px solid #FF4B00 with 2px offset).
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Must respect prefers-reduced-motion. Validations MUST appear inline under the input immediately, NOT in alerts. Use color and text (e.g., 'Error: field required').

module_specific_rules.login: Split screen layout. Stark white left side with minimal form. Right side is full-bleed architectural image with max 20% dark overlay.
module_specific_rules.maintenance_admin: Dense bento grid for forms. Use distinct tabs for Book Management vs User Management.
module_specific_rules.transactions: Prominent top search bar (Book Availability) spanning the layout. Results shown in the stark table format described above. Issue/Return forms strictly structured in two columns on desktop.
module_specific_rules.fine_payment: High-contrast breakout section or modal. The 'Fine Paid' checkbox is isolated and highlighted with a warning border if pending.

image_urls.description: A very tall building with a lot of books on it. Use as the full-bleed background for the right half of the split-screen Login page.
Panoramic view of a grand circular library. Use as a subtle header background banner with a heavy #F9F9F8 overlay for dashboard empty states if needed.

icons.instructions: Use @phosphor-icons/react. Use 'regular' weight for UI elements, 'fill' for active states.

testing.requirements: Every interactive element (buttons, inputs, radios, checkboxes, table rows) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format reflecting its role (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'book-search-input', 'fine-paid-checkbox').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Chivo' (headings) and 'IBM Plex Sans/Mono' (body/data) via Google Fonts or next/font.
Implement Shadcn, but strip out all border-radius (rounded-md -> rounded-none) and drop-shadows. Use strict borders instead.
Forms must contain inline validation text in the UI (red #D92D20), absolutely no JS window.alert().
Ensure password fields are masked (<input type='password'>).
Implement role-based routing (Admin vs User). Users attempting to access /maintenance should be redirected.
For the Issue Book flow, enforce date calculation (Return Date = Issue Date + 15 days) directly in the component state.
Ensure the Fine Payment logic strictly requires the checkbox to be checked if fine > 0 before allowing form submission.
